response.justification: Maria Rodriguez brings 16+ years of broad engineering experience across multiple languages and system types, including genuine high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second) and recent AI agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq. However, the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role centers on: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, rollout-risk controls, telemetry pipelines, or statistical/data analysis at scale. The position requires a Principal-level engineer with deep, demonstrated ownership of growth measurement systems; this candidate's background is generalist full-stack with no discernible experimentation specialization, making the fit gap too large to bridge at the IC6 seniority level.
strengths: 16+ years of engineering experience across C/C++, TypeScript, Java, and DLang, satisfying the years-of-experience and language-breadth requirements
High-scale distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and low-latency architecture
Recent AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework work at re:cinq is directionally relevant to the cloud AI and developer tools industry context
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform experience: no A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout-risk management anywhere in the resume
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipeline, or statistical/data analysis experience mentioned, which are non-negotiable technical pillars for this role

Resume carries the 'Senior Software Developer' title with no demonstrated Principal/IC6-level cross-team architectural leadership, multi-workstream ownership, or measurable organizational influence at the required scope

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
